candidate_priority.activation_rule: Already selected by idea_validation_decision; do not reopen positive controller branches inside iteration 3.

dataset_plan.source: Reuse the completed 50 GSM8K + 50 MBPP audited manifest from pilot_evidence_closure_v1
selection_rules: Do not change sample IDs unless validation finds a path/integrity defect.
Treat the completed manifest as fixed evidence, not as a resampling budget.
Keep all downstream packaging current-only and sample-level joinable.

runtime_contract.policy: Reuse the completed stable eager runtime contract from the existing pilot; no new optimization claim is allowed.

multi_gpu_policy.scheduler_note: This planning cycle packages existing evidence and should not request GPU execution unless a validation defect forces a narrowly scoped repair.

planning_pass: The current evidence bundle remains self-contained and reproducible.
The paper object is frozen as an audited negative case study.
All paper-ready tables and figure specs can be generated from existing artifacts.
Follow-up notes do not reopen the positive controller mainline.
planning_fail: The plan defaults to rerunning the completed pilot.
The plan restores cand_audit_mainline as an active branch.
Proposal wording still allows almost-win salvage.
Packaging relies on non-current or non-joinable assets.

visualization_plan.description: Main benchmark comparison across the four completed arms
Fixed / harmed / unchanged counts by arm and dataset
MBPP harm profile and failure-mode summary
Allowed vs forbidden wording table for the paper

risks.impact: reviewer interprets the paper as a failed method dressed up as a protocol
risks.mitigation: Freeze claim scope early and keep all positive wording subordinate to the sham-control failure.

risks.impact: credibility loss because runtime fairness was only logged, not solved
risks.mitigation: Treat runtime_contract.json as a traceability artifact, not as a headline contribution.

risks.impact: planning stage loses focus and reintroduces abandoned branches
risks.mitigation: Isolate follow-up gaps into a separate appendix-style note with explicit `future work only` wording.
